article.title: Uber coding screening-round 1
article.content:
Interviewed for MLE role at Uber. Applied online.

Question was to return the borders of a binary tree (clockwise) from right, buttom and left.
``` 
            1
          /    \
        2          3
      /   \       /
    4       5   6       
```

output: [1,3,6,5,4,2]

Tried to use DFS to get the nodes on edges, but wasn't able to come up with a runable solution. -> rejected.
What's the equivalent question in LC?
